items.title: Jarace Walker throws down alley-oop slam
items.author: espn.in
items.body_excerpt: Jarace Walker throws down alley-oop slam espn.in

items.title: Other stuff from Chad Buchanan yesterday. He said the Pacers probably won't make an "earth-shattering, ground-breaking move" in free agency and will focus on prioritizing depth. Indicates no salary dump of Jarace Walker or Ben Sheppard: www.indystar.com/story/sports...
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: Other stuff from Chad Buchanan yesterday. He said the Pacers probably won't make an "earth-shattering, ground-breaking move" in free agency and will focus on prioritizing depth. Indicates no salary dump of Jarace Walker or Ben Sheppard: www.indystar.com/story/sports...

media.title: Pacers GM Chad Buchanan shares team’s offseason strategy
media.description: Chad Buchanan said the Pacers will look to add to their depth in free agency, but probably won't make an ‘earth-shattering, ground-breaking move’
